overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring the Afterlife nightclub. The player walks through a neon-lit back alley, engages in a brief fight, then enters the club descending stairs and exploring multiple levels including the main bar area and back lounges. The environment features heavy red neon lighting, industrial cyberpunk architecture, and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered back alley entrance to nightclub

events.description: ego grabs an NPC and throws them to the ground near the trash pile

agents.ego_description: walking through the alley then engaging in hand-to-hand combat with an NPC near the entrance

notable_agents.action: being grabbed and thrown down by ego in a brief fight
standing against the wall near the neon sign observing the confrontation

entered.detail: large red neon sign with stylized text reading 'Afterlife' mounted on the wall
pile of garbage bags and scattered trash on the concrete ground
low concrete seating structure along the left wall
concrete wall with graffiti and the large neon sign mounted on it

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow covered alleyway toward the Afterlife nightclub entrance, illuminated by a prominent red neon sign. At around 7 seconds, the player engages in a brief physical confrontation with an NPC near a pile of trash, throwing them to the ground before continuing toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance stairwell with red carpet and neon lighting

events.description: passing through the doorway from the exterior alley into the club interior
beginning descent down the staircase with red neon rail lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance doorway with red carpet and descending the stairs into the lower level

entered.detail: red carpet runner leading from the entrance into the club
bank of gray metal lockers along the right wall near the entrance
large circular ventilation fan mounted on the wall
red neon light strips running along the edges of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The player enters the nightclub through a doorway with a red carpet, passing metal lockers and an industrial fan. The camera descends a staircase illuminated by red neon strips, transitioning from the exterior alley into the interior stairwell.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor overlooking the main dance floor

events.description: exiting the stairwell into the upper corridor with advertising posters
looking through large windows into the main bar area below with visible dancers

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper corridor and observing the main club floor through windows

notable_agents.action: dancing on the main floor visible through the window

entered.detail: illuminated advertising posters on the wall including one for 'Holiday' beverage
large rectangular window providing view down to the main bar area
blue neon light strip running along the base of the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player moves through an upper corridor lined with advertising posters and blue neon trim, looking through windows into the main bar area below where NPCs are dancing. The environment transitions from the industrial stairwell to a more commercial corridor space.

scene_state.functional_zone: main nightclub floor with circular bar

events.description: entering the main bar area from the upper corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the main bar floor, passing the circular bar and seated patrons

notable_agents.action: sitting on a bench along the wall with a drink
sitting at the circular bar counter

entered.detail: large circular bar counter with glowing purple base lighting
horizontal red neon light strips mounted on the wall above the seating area
small round tables with drinks and bottles on them

segments.scene_description: The player enters the main nightclub floor featuring a prominent circular bar with purple lighting. The area has red neon strips on the walls, round tables with patrons sitting and drinking, and a more open layout compared to the narrow corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: back lounge corridor and seating area with city view

events.description: moving from the main bar into the back corridor with red neon strips
entering the back lounge area with large geometric windows showing the city outside

agents.ego_description: walking through the back corridor into a lounge area with large windows overlooking the city

notable_agents.action: standing and smoking near the entrance to the back lounge

entered.detail: horizontal red neon light strips lining both walls of the corridor
large angular glass windows with geometric frames showing the city outside
curved seating booths with orange neon underlighting

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a back corridor lined with intense red neon strips into a lounge area featuring orange-lit booths and large geometric windows offering a view of the city outside. An NPC stands smoking near the entrance to this final lounge space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty, neon-lit alleyway into the expansive, multi-layered interior of the Afterlife nightclub. It begins with a walk through a narrow covered passage under a red neon sign, where a brief physical confrontation with an NPC occurs near a pile of trash before the camera proceeds to the entrance. As the player steps onto a red carpet, the scene shifts from the exterior alley into an industrial stairwell lined with red neon strips and metal lockers. The camera then ascends through a commercial corridor accented with blue neon and advertising posters, offering a glimpse of the dancing crowds below before opening up into the main floor's circular bar area bathed in purple and red light. Finally, the movement flows through a back corridor of intense red neon into a lounge featuring orange-lit booths and large geometric windows overlooking the city.
